reasoning: Avatar 3 releases on December 19, 2025. To win the 2025 calendar gross, it would have to out-earn the entire year's top movie in just 13 days (ending Dec 31). Historically, late December releases almost never win the calendar gross of their release year because of the truncated window. Avatar 2, for example, made $401 million in 16 days in 2022 and was beaten by Top Gun: Maverick's $718 million calendar gross. Currently in 2025, A Minecraft Movie has already crossed $355M domestic by April, and there are several major summer blockbusters yet to come ('Superman', 'Jurassic World: Rebirth'). It's exceedingly unlikely Avatar 3 makes $400M-$500M+ in just 13 days. The market priced this correctly around 7%.
